Prosperity7 Ventures seeks to support companies and business models across various sectors
snippet.description:
Prosperity7 began with a $1 billion fund, backed by Aramco, with an aim towards diversified growth opportunities. The team is seeking unparalleled disruptive investments with global scalability and resilience; creating partnerships with inspirational founders who align with that vision.

In addition to their access to financial resources, the Prosperity7 team dedicate themselves to building long-term collaborative partnerships. Through its vast network, Prosperity7 can quickly build connections and identify strategic opportunities for early-stage enterprises to expand, enter new and emerging markets, as well as grow to a global scale of business. 

Prosperity7 is growing its investments across different stages and numerous industries ranging from enterprise, financial, semiconductors, blockchain, food, robotics and mobility, to medical and healthcare solutions, looking to help support the next wave of leading, global champions. 

#50LOC #TBDMedia #investment
_________________________________________________________________________________________________

TBD Media is an international purpose driven media group that helps companies, organisations and governments tell their brand stories in a direct and human way. Combining over 30 years of experience in marketing, content creation, video production and publishing, our senior team have been providing thought-provoking content since 2015. 

Learn more about our projects and campaigns on: https://www.tbdmediagroup.com/

Follow us on social media! 
Facebook: @TBDMedia
Twitter: @TBD_Media
LinkedIn: TBD Media Group
Instagram: @tbdmediagroup

snippet.title: Saudi Aramco's NAMAAT expands
snippet.description:
Aramco expands Namaat industrial investment programs, Arab News reports. The Saudi Arabian Oil Company announced a major expansion of its Namaat industrial investment programs, with 55 agreements and Memoranda of Understanding (MoUs) across the sustainability, digital, industrial, manufacturing and social innovation sectors. Namaat, which has grown from 32 to 55 investments since last year, supports industrial investment partnerships, helping to create jobs for Saudis and contributing to national growth and capacity building. The program aims to enable opportunities for local and international companies and leverage various incentives offered through the government’s Shareek program and other initiatives.

#saudi #oil #vision2030 #supplychain

snippet.title: FII ESG London - S07  |  Narrowing the Delta
snippet.description:
Even if business leaders and policymakers come anywhere close to meeting their pledges to accelerate decarbonization outlinedby COP26, there is still a very large delta between these goals and the climate action necessary to protect cities, regions, andcommunities around the world. And while the Paris Accord’s goal to limit global warming to 1.5 degrees Celsius — compared to preindustriallevels — is necessary and worthwhile, climate change will still unleash transformative shifts in global health, migration,energy, severe weather, and beyond. What are the steps necessary to solve the disparity between policy goals and real-lifesolutions—and what investments are required to make meaningful change?

MODERATOR
• Nik Gowing, Founder, International Journalist & Broadcaster, Thinking the Unthinkable

SPEAKERS
• Yi Cui, Director, Precourt Institute for Energy, Stanford University
• Gillian Lofts, Global Sustainable Finance Lead Partner, Ernst & Young (EY)
• Melissa McDonald, Managing Director, Global Head of ESG and Climate Indexes, MSCI
• Anna Moore, Sustainability & Strategy Partner, McKinsey
• Bob Maughon, Chief Technology & Sustainability Officer, Saudi Basic Industries Corporation (SABIC)
• Ashraf Al-Ghazzawi, Vice President, Strategy & Market Analysis, Aramco
• Special Speaker

• Special Speaker

snippet.title: PETRO RABIGH'S PRESIDENT AND CEO MESSAGE, OTHMAN AL-GHAMDI
snippet.description:
IN THE GCC REGION’S LARGEST ECONOMY, THE BIGGEST TRANSFORMATION PROGRAM IS UNDERWAY, VISION 2030.

Through the sheer scale of its ambition, this national program has been able to mobilize companies across sectors to join forces and play their part in realizing the country’s future-focused goals.

Petro Rabigh, a world scale integrated refinery and petrochemicals complex, jointly founded by Saudi Aramco and Sumitomo, is one such company. It is leading the charge in expanding the petrochemicals sector in the Kingdom, fostering job creation and harnessing talent.

Today, this national champion stands at an inflection point as it builds on the momentum of sustained growth and looks ahead to a positive journey.

"At Petro Rabigh, we have a clear strategy supported by promising growth pillars and a pipeline of opportunities in  regional and international markets. We are confident in the long-term fundamentals of our business and our ability to generate returns to our shareholders. The capital restructuring transaction will further enhance our equity position through reducing debt, increasing share capital, and enabling the company to meet its growth objectives." PETRO RABIGH'S PRESIDENT AND CEO MESSAGE, OTHMAN AL-GHAMDI

snippet.title: Boycott on Banu Hashim | O Level Notes Islamiyat 2058
snippet.description:
The people of Mecca, especially the tribe Quraish always tried to persecute the followers of our Holy Prophet Muhamad (Peace be upon him). They tried to persecute them through every possible way. It was not easy for our Holy Prophet Muhamad (Peace be upon him) and his followers to continue the preaching activities of the Islam but our Holy Prophet Muhamad (Peace be upon him) and his followers didn’t withdraw their mission to convey the message of ALLAH. The successful migration of Abyssinia became a big threat to the Quraish. They tried to get back the Muslims from Nijashi but failed and Nijashi accepted Islam after listening the Holy Quran. 
A big upset was felt by the people of Mecca when they saw that Hazrat Hamza and Hazrat Umar accepted the Islam. The honor and the respect of our Holy Prophet Muhamad (Peace be upon him) was growing on daily basis. it was not acceptable for the Quraish that someone is being a challenge for them. It is because they planned to boycott the family of Banu Hashim and announced that nobody will continue his relations with the family of Banu Hashim. It was a written agreement signed by all the branches of Quraish tribe. According to that agreement, no one from the whole tribe of Quraish, can come on any social or economic relations with the family of Banu Hashim. It is important to remember that our Holy Prophet Muhamad (Peace be upon him) was also from the family of Banu Hashim. They decided not to meet, sell or to buy anything from Banu Hashim. That was really a tough time for the family of Banu Hashim. This incident is from 7th year of Prophet hood. 
As the agreement was in written form, all the people from Quraish were agreed to act upon it. It was later hung in Ka'ba Tullah. Now the people of Mecca broke all of their relations from Banu Hashim. This thing forced the Holy Prophet Muhamad (Peace be upon him) to leave Mecca so he left Mecca and lived in a pass in between the mountains which was called Shib Abi Talib. He lived there for three years along with his followers. It was a very difficult time. There was nothing to eat even for infants. People who lived there, ate boiled leaves and boiled leather but remained persistent till the hard time ended. 
There were some people of Quraish who got tired of this boycott, tried to finish it.  After three years, the termite destroyed all the agreement hung in Ka'ba Tullah except the word of ALLAH.  Then ALLAH informed the Holy Prophet Muhamad (Peace be upon him) about this through message. After receiving this message our Holy Prophet Muhamad (Peace be upon him) and his followers decided to come out of this place. It was 10th year of Prophet hood. When the behavior of the people of Mecca not changed then after some time by the order from ALLAH, our Holy Prophet Muhamad (Peace be upon him) decided to migrated to Medina to continue his duty to spread the message of ALLAH. 
#Quran #Hadees #SourceofIslamicLaw#Boycott#Banu Hashim
